name: Safari Industries (India) Limited
summary: Safari Industries (India) Limited manufactures and markets luggage and luggage related accessories in India. Its products include hard, soft, lightweight, and TSA luggage bags; casual, laptop, and concept backpacks; rucksucks; and overnighters. It sells its products under the Safari, Magnum, Genius, and Genie brands through stores, as well as through online. Safari Industries (India) Limited was incorporated in 1980 and is based in Mumbai, India.
